summary: Iteration 46 - i18n Language Tests & Company/Avatar Modal UI Tests - ALL PASSED. Verified: 1) All Marketing Studio labels show in English ('Advertiser Company', 'Presenter Avatar', 'Campaign Name', 'Video Mode', 'No Video', 'Narration', 'Presenter'), 2) All Agents page filter tabs in English ('All', 'Sales', 'Support', 'Scheduling', 'SAC', 'Onboarding', 'Personal'), 3) 'Create Agent' button shows English text, 4) '+' buttons appear on headers for Company and Avatar sections, 5) Company modal opens with all fields (Name, Phone, WhatsApp toggle, Website URL), 6) Avatar modal opens with photo upload flow, 7) Companies appear as selectable cards, 8) 'Register Company' empty state shown when no companies, 9) 'No avatar yet' empty state shown when no avatars, 10) Company creation saves and adds to selectable list, 11) Agent details drawer shows 'Skills' and 'Personality' section titles in English.

company_selectable_cards.description: Companies appear as selectable cards with golden highlight when selected

steps_verified: Save closes modal and shows success toast

seed_data_creation: Test company 'Test Company Inc' created during testing to verify company creation flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46: All i18n language features VERIFIED working - Marketing Studio shows English labels (Advertiser Company, Presenter Avatar, Campaign Name, Video Mode, No Video, Narration, Presenter), Agents page shows English filter tabs. Company and Avatar modals work correctly with '+' buttons in headers. Companies appear as selectable cards after creation. localStorage keys: agentzz_companies, agentzz_avatars. Route: /marketing/studio for studio tests, /agents for agent page tests.
